name: Chicken a La Nancy
recipeIngredient: 14 ounce can whole artichoke hearts, halved or quartered
rice pilaf or mixed white/wild rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts.
2. Cut into 2-inch squares.
3. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and sauté until soft.
5. Add lemon slices and fresh mushrooms, and continue to sauté until soft.
6. Stir in the chicken pieces and cook for a few minutes until they are no longer pink.
7. Add flour, white wine, salt, pepper, and oregano. Stir frequently and cook for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Add artichoke hearts and heat for an additional minute.
9. Serve with rice pilaf or mixed rice.
